title: corymbia ferruginea
intro: Corymbia ferruginea, also known as Red Gum or Rusty Gum, is a species of tree native to Australia, belonging to the family Myrtaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corymbia ferruginea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a traditional remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of Corymbia ferruginea often involve the bark and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
